hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "dev" ]; then git add -A; changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -5 | tr '\n' ' '); if [ -n "$(git diff --cached --name-only)" ]; then git commit -m "auto: edit ${changed}"; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: devブランチに自動コミット中...
